prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海交通大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约85名、67名、96名、50名、105名，整体波动较大，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约105名， 较2024年大幅后移55名，反映出当年竞争格局出现明显变化；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年6人、2022年7人、2023年7人、2024年6人、2025年3人，2026 年计划进一步缩减至2人，较2025年缩招33%，招生名额持续收紧，理论上使竞争有所缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中 国大学排名连续多年稳居第4名，属于全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生具有持续强吸引力；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端相关舆 情事件（如学生私吞竞赛奖金、撤稿数量较多等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平；拥有28个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、生物学A+、临床医学A+等王牌学科实力突出，与该校在海南招生的电子信息类（计算机永强 试验班）、人工智能（拔尖英才试点班）等专业高度匹配，持续吸引优质生源。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热推荐，人工智能专业 虽谨慎观望但关注度极高；海南省2026年高考总人数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧，未 出现大幅波动；上海交通大学位于上海市，属一线城市高校，对海南考生具有较强跨省吸引力；该校在海南省招生人数极少（近年约2-8人），占全国招生总人 数比例不足1%，属于小规模招生省份，位次易受个别高分考生报考决策影响而产生较大波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划缩招33%（使位次前移）与海南省考生总数增 长约15.7%（使位次后移）两股相反力量，以及声誉偏负面带来的轻微抑制效应，预计2026年最低录取位次约90名，较2025年105名前移约15名；区间80–100名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（拔尖英才试点班）
- 电子信息类（计算机永强试验班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 上述两个专业均为同一专业组（03组），选科要求均为物理、化学(2科必选)，录取位次相同，无分档差异
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年上海交通大学在海南省仅投放2个招生名额（人工智能拔尖英才试点班、电子信息类计算机永强试验班），均为该校顶尖王牌专业，选科要求均为物理+化学。预测位次约9 0名，区间80–100名。位次在预测区间内建议积极冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（80名以内）录取希望较大；位次低于区间上限（100名以外）则风险较高，建议搭配其他院校保底 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Jiao Tong University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 85th, 67th, 96th, 50th, and 105th, showing significant fluctuations without a clear single trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 105th, a substantial backward shift of 55 places compared to 2024, reflecting notable changes in the competitive landscape that year; the university's enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 3 in 2025, with the 2026 plan further reduced to 2, a 33% decrease from 2025, indicating a continuous tightening of admission slots, theoretically easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranked 4th in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide, with a sustained strong appeal to high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct-related public opinion incidents (such as students embezzling competition bonuses and a high number of retractions), which may mildly suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level; it has 28 A- or above disciplines, including top-tier disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Biology A+, and Clinical Medicine A+, which highly match the majors recruited in Hainan, such as Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class) and Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class), continuously attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication majors continue to be highly recommended with sustained social heat, while the Artificial Intelligence major, though cautiously observed, has extremely high attention; the total number of Hainan Province college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 78,000, an increase of approximately 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion in candidate scale and overall intensified competition, without major fluctuations; Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city university, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hainan candidates; the university's enrollment in Hainan Province is extremely small (about 2-8 people in recent years), accounting for less than 1% of the total national enrollment, making it a small-scale enrollment province, where rankings are susceptible to significant fluctuations due to individual high-scoring candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two opposing forces of a 33% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (which moves the ranking forward) and an approximately 15.7% increase in the total number of Hainan candidates (which moves the ranking backward), along with the mild suppression effect from the slightly negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 90th, a forward shift of about 15 places from 105th in 2025; the range is 80–100th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- The above two majors are both in the same major group (Group 03), with the same subject requirements of Physics and Chemistry (both required), and the same admission ranking, so there is no tier difference
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Shanghai Jiao Tong University will only offer 2 admission slots in Hainan Province (Artificial Intelligence Top Talent Pilot Class and Electronic Information Computer Yongqiang Pilot Class), both of which are the university's top-tier flagship majors, with subject requirements of Physics + Chemistry. The predicted ranking is about 90th, with a range of 80–100th. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to actively aim; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 80th) have a higher chance of admission; those with rankings below the upper limit of the range (outside 100th) face higher risk and are advised to pair with other institutions as a safety option.
